rows.label: qev085606_MSG0001
rows.name: Lao-san![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085606_MSG0002
rows.name: Sorry about that, Lin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085606_MSG0003
rows.name:
I heard you took care of the mission
I was supposed to help with?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085606_MSG0004
rows.name:
We really did. It was a lot
of hard work, you know![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085606_MSG0005
rows.name:
My bad. I'll treat you to some tea in
the near future to make up for it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085606_MSG0006
rows.name:
There's a shop with a good selection of tea
leaves. Though they're native to Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085606_MSG0007
rows.name: Really!? I'll be looking forward to it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085606_MSG0008
rows.name:
Hey, hey, you're going to
forgive him just like that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085606_MSG0009
rows.name:
Well, yeah. It makes me much happier
than being bribed with chocolate![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085606_MSG0010
rows.name: Is that how it works?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085606_JNK0010
rows.name: Greed

rows.label: qev085606_SEL0011
rows.name: Complain that you want something, too.

rows.label: qev085606_JNK0020
rows.name: Suspicion

rows.label: qev085606_SEL0021
rows.name: Interrogate Lao about what he was doing.

rows.label: qev085606_MSG0011
rows.name: Alright, alright, understood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085606_MSG0012
rows.name:
In your case, I suppose getting away
with just tea won't cut it, will it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085606_MSG0013
rows.name:
Good grief, this is going
to cost me a fortune.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085606_MSG0014
rows.name:
Hey, hey, spare me the tasteless prying.
I'll treat you too, so let me off the hook.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085606_MSG0015
rows.name:
Doug. So, have the data
analysis results come out?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085606_MSG0016
rows.name: No, not yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085606_MSG0017
rows.name: I pray it doesn't turn into a serious issue.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085606_MSG0018
rows.name: Yeah, no kidding.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085606_MSG0019
rows.name:
Everything is fine mo! No matter what
happens, Tatsu will solve it mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085606_MSG0020
rows.name:
Leave it to Tatsu and rest
easy on a ship of mud mo~~![ST:wait ]
